GoalOS Loop ContractLong-run agent control
ConciergeCommand CenterLoopUntil-DONEEvidenceSettlementLegal
Agent loop · contract first · restart-safe

The loop is the product.
Proof is the stop condition.

Run a browser-local control room for long-running agents. The loop separates planner, builder, evaluator, and trace-reader roles; negotiates the contract before work; writes state to a virtual disk; restarts from durable files; reads traces; scores taste; deletes obsolete harness; and exposes the next bottleneck.

Public-safe: no account, no form, no wallet, no network request, no cookies, no analytics, no browser storage, no production authority, and no user data wanted.

Loop constitution
GoalOSLoop
ContractPlanBuildVerifyTraceRestartChronicle
0iterations
0%proof readiness
72harness drag
100proof debt
Mission contract
contract.jsoncontract: ready for negotiation
progress.mdprogress: no loop has run yet
log.mdlog: trace will appear here

The virtual disk is in memory only. The page does not use browser storage and does not transmit anything.

Loop rail
READY · contract not yet runDefine the done condition before the first agent writes code.
  1. System waiting for a contract-bound loop.
Control sliders
Current bottleneck

Contract specificity

The first bottleneck is not code. It is deciding what DONE means.

Rules the demo makes visible

Days-long agents need loops, not hope.

01

Loop before prompt

A one-shot prompt disappears. A loop keeps gathering, acting, verifying, and repeating until the contract is satisfied.

02

Separate roles

Planner, builder, evaluator, and trace reader do not grade themselves. Role separation is the first safety rail.

03

Negotiate done first

The contract defines acceptance criteria, forbidden shortcuts, risk boundary, and replay requirement before work begins.

04

Write state to a virtual disk

The loop survives by preserving compact state files: contract, progress, and trace. Memory is reviewable, not hidden in context.

05

Restart is a feature

A good loop can throw away a bad path, reload state, and continue from the last governed checkpoint.

06

Score taste explicitly

Subjective quality becomes governable only when the rubric is written down and applied consistently.

07

Read traces

Debugging means reading the trace, not guessing from the final output. The trace shows where judgment diverged.

08

Delete the harness

The harness should shrink when the model or procedure improves. Otherwise the scaffold becomes the product.

09

The bottleneck moves

Once coding is easy, planning becomes hard. Once planning works, verification becomes hard. The loop reveals the next constraint.

GoalOS translation

A loop becomes an institution when every cycle emits proof.

GoalOS turns the long-running agent pattern into an institutional protocol: objective → mission contract → bounded role loop → trace → verifier decision → Evidence Docket → governed decision state → Chronicle → reusable capability.

ObjectiveMission ContractRolesTraceVerifierEvidence DocketChronicleCapability
© MontrealAI · Loop Contract Theatre runs locally in-browser · no wallet · no network · no user data wanted · Privacy · Terms · Legal · AGIALPHA Boundary
